eas_text: A civil authority has issued A REQUIRED MONTHLY TEST for the following counties or areas: Benewah; Bonner; Boundary; Clearwater; Idaho; Kootenai; Latah; Lewis; Nez Perce; Shoshone, ID; Lincoln; Sanders, MT; Adams; Asotin; Columbia; Ferry; Garfield; Lincoln; Pend Oreille; Spokane; Stevens; Whitman, WA; at 02:00 PM ON MAY 5, 2026 Effective until 05:00 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: In the event of an actual emergency, broadcasters would be bringing you important public safety information. The following tones conclude this test.
